body: Docker Content Sekedar share tentang docker
title: Docker

body:
Case Disini kita akan mengkoneksikan docker container dengan mysql yang terinstall di host mesin (luar container).
Prequist  Mesin : ubuntu 20.04 LTS Mysql : mysql Ver 14.14 Distrib 5.7.37, Docker : Docker version 20.10.12, build e91ed57 Docker Compose  Attention  Pastikan mysql open akses / specific ip address, agar bisa diakses secara remote dari ip address tertentu Pastikan jalankan docker dengan extra network pastikan port 3306 allow, ufw allow 3306  Steps 1. Konfigurasi MySql   pastikan bind-address terbuka ubah ke 0.0.0.0, file /etc/mysql/mysql.conf.d/mysqld.cnf
1[mysqld]2pid-file = /var/run/mysqld/mysqld.pid3socket = /var/run/mysqld/mysqld.sock4datadir = /var/lib/mysql5log-error = /var/log/mysql/error.log67# bagian ini8bind-address = 0.0.0.0 910symbolic-links=0note: jika ingin ubah port, tambahkan variabel port di file /etc/mysql/my.cnf
1[mysqld]2port=3305  Set spesifik ip address untuk user mysql tertentu
  mengecek user
1mysql>selectuser,hostfromuser;23+---------------+-----------+ 4|user|host|5+---------------+-----------+ 6|simade|%|7|mysql.session|localhost|8|mysql.sys|localhost|9|root|localhost|10|simade|localhost|11+---------------+-----------+ 125rowsinset(0.00sec)  Ubah identity user atau rename kemudian sesuaikan ip addressnya. Tanda % dipake agar bisa diakses dari semua host. Sedang disini kita akan gunakan spesifik ip address nya docker container.
Untuk mendapatkan Ip adress container jalankan perintah berikut :
1docker inspect -f '{{range.NetworkSettings.Networks}}{{.IPAddress}}{{end}}' [container_id/name]23172.31.0.2  Setelah mendapatkan ip address-nya, tempel ip tersebut ke user mysql dengan perintah berikut dst :
1#Cara12mysql>ALTERUSER'tarno'@'%'IDENTIFIEDWITHmysql_native_passwordBY'password';34#Cara25mysql>RENAMEUSER'tarno'@'127.0.0.1'TO'tarno'@'localhost';67#Grantall8mysql>GRANTALLON*.*TO'tarno'@'localhost';910#Flush11mysql>FlUSHPRIVILEGE;    Forward port mysql
 cek status 1$ ufw status 2Status: active 34To Action From 5-- ------ ---- 622/tcp ALLOW Anywhere 780 ALLOW Anywhere 8443 ALLOW Anywhere 963791 ALLOW Anywhere 1022/tcp (v6) ALLOW Anywhere (v6) 1180 (v6) ALLOW Anywhere (v6) 12443 (v6) ALLOW Anywhere (v6) 1363791 (v6) ALLOW Anywhere (v6) 1415$ ufw allow 3306 16$ ufw status [number] 17$ ufw del [number]     Sesuaikan policy requirement (lihat bagian Troubleshoot)
  2. konfigurasi Docker Compose  pastikan docker-compose.yaml file sbb : 1version:"3.9"2services:3simade:4image:${REPOSITORY}5container_name:my_name6ports:7- "80:80"8restart:on-failure9volumes:10- /home/serverdpmd/project/upload/:/var/www/app/application/upload/11- /home/serverdpmd/project/.env:/var/www/app/.env12extra_hosts:13# tambahkan bagian ini14# atau gunakan perintah '--add-host=host.docker.internal:host-gateway' jika dijalankan manual15- "host.docker.internal:host-gateway"16# konfigurasi network & global network (paling bawah), untuk mendapatkan ip statik17networks:18network:19ipv4_address:172.x.x.x2021networks:22default:23name:my_network24#will be prefixed with 'parent_dir_name_' so for me, it will be 'mysql_network'25network:26ipam:27config:28- subnet:172.x.x.x/16  Securing MySql  Ubah mysql port Jalankan mysql_secure_installation dan pastikan user root tidak dapat diakses sembarangan  Troubleshoot :     Error : Your password does not satisfy the current policy requirements
  Solusi : sesuaikan kebutuhan validate passwordnya seperti ini.
1mysql>SETGLOBALvalidate_password_check_user_name=ON;2QueryOK,0rowsaffected(0.00sec)34mysql>SETGLOBALvalidate_password_length=4;5QueryOK,0rowsaffected(0.00sec)67mysql>SHOWVARIABLESLIKE'validate_password%';8+--------------------------------------+-------+ 9|Variable_name|Value|10+--------------------------------------+-------+ 11|validate_password_check_user_name|ON|12|validate_password_dictionary_file||13|validate_password_length|4|14|validate_password_mixed_case_count|1|15|validate_password_number_count|0|16|validate_password_policy|LOW|17|validate_password_special_char_count|1|18+--------------------------------------+-------+
title: Koneksi container dengan host (localhost)

body: Home Basics Discover what this Hugo theme is all about and the core concepts behind it.

Docker – How to cleanup (unused) resources Once in a while, you may need to cleanup resources (containers, volumes, images, networks) …
delete volumes 1$ docker volume rm $(docker volume ls -qf dangling=true) 2$ docker volume ls -qf dangling=true | xargs -r docker volume rm 34# delete networks 5$ docker network ls 6$ docker network ls | grep "bridge" 7$ docker network rm $(docker network ls | grep "bridge" | awk '/ / { print $1 }') remove docker images 1$ docker images 2$ docker rmi $(docker images --filter "dangling=true" -q --no-trunc) 3$ docker images | grep "none" 4$ docker rmi $(docker images | grep "none" | awk '/ / { print $3 }') remove docker containers 1$ docker ps 2$ docker ps -a 3$ docker rm $(docker ps -qa --no-trunc --filter "status=exited") Resize disk space for docker vm 1$ docker-machine create --driver virtualbox --virtualbox-disk-size "40000" default Referensi:
 Clean Up Volume Remove unused
title: Docker Clean Command
